---
title: "Malaria Cell Classifier"
author: "Zahera Khatoon"
date: "Spring 2026"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
df <- read.csv("../clean_features.csv")
```

# Summary of Data

```{r}
str(df)
```

```{r}
summary(df)
```

# Class Counts

```{r}
table(df$label)
```

# Feature Comparison

# Area
```{r}
boxplot(area ~ label, data = df, main = "Area by Class", col = c("green", "purple"))
```

# Perimeter
```{r}
boxplot(perimeter ~ label, data = df, main = "Perimeter by Class", col = c("green", "purple"))
```

# Eccentricity
```{r}
boxplot(eccentricity ~ label, data = df, main = "Eccentricity by Class", col = c("green", "purple"))
```

# Mean Intensity
```{r}
boxplot(mean_intensity ~ label, data = df, main = "Mean Intensity by Class", col = c("green", "purple"))
```
